archetype: ARCHETYPE 2: THE PERFORMANCE PRO mixed with ARCHETYPE 5: LUXURY (Elite Command Center)
concept: Turn a mechanical collections task into an elite, high-visibility 'Command Center' experience. High density data, ultra-modern dark mode (True Grey), and electric neon accents. It must feel like an advanced Bloomberg Terminal combined with the sleekness of Stripe.

headings.usage: Use for all major headers, metrics numbers (e.g., Total Sent), and dashboard widget titles. Apply tight letter spacing (tracking-tight).

body.usage: Use for all data tables, labels, form inputs, and regular UI text. Clean and legible for high data density.

mono.usage: Use exclusively for the Execution Console/Logs, Variables in Templates (e.g., {nombre}), and numeric IDs.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl bg-zinc-950/70 with a 1px border-white/10 for the floating action bar and sticky headers. No pure transparent backgrounds over content.
visual_enhancers.surfaces: Rely on 1px subtle borders (border-white/10) and layered elevation (Zinc-950 base -> Zinc-900 cards -> Zinc-800 inputs).
visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use subtle ambient drop shadows for primary actions (e.g., drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(225,255,0,0.2)] for the main 'Start Campaign' button).
visual_enhancers.terminal_look: The Execution Console must look like a hacker terminal: Deep black background (#000000), border-white/10, JetBrains Mono font, color-coded log lines (Green for sent, Red for error, Zinc-500 for timestamps).

grids_and_layouts.app_structure: Left: Collapsible minimalist Sidebar. Center: Main Workspace (Stats + High-Density Table). Right or Bottom Panel: Execution Console.
grids_and_layouts.stats_row: Mode B (High Density Grid). 4 columns (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4) with gap-4. Cards have solid Zinc-900 backgrounds, minimal padding (p-4), and border-white/5.
grids_and_layouts.data_table: ULTRA-DENSE. The user handles 300 rows/day. Do not use bloated default Shadcn table padding. Use py-1.5 px-3 for table cells. Alternating row colors (Zinc-950 / Zinc-900) for fast scanning. Sticky header with backdrop-blur.
grids_and_layouts.floating_action_bar: When rows are selected, a glassmorphic bar slides up from the bottom (fixed bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50). It contains bulk actions like 'Send to X selected', 'Export', 'Cancel'.

motion.hover_states: All interactive rows and buttons must have subtle color shifts (transition-colors duration-200).
motion.buttons: Primary actions should have a tactile active:scale-95 effect.
motion.console_feed: New log entries should appear instantly. Use a blinking cursor '_' at the bottom of the log to make it feel alive.
motion.loaders: Avoid generic circular spinners. Use an ASCII-style loader (e.g., [ ===   ]) or a pulsing neon status dot.

components.country_selector: Top bar component. A segmented control or pill-shaped toggle group. When a country is selected, it glows with its specific neon color (from the colors.countries dictionary).
components.status_badge: Small pill (px-2 py-0.5 text-xs rounded-full) with a pulsing dot indicator + text. Very minimalist.
components.variable_tag: In the Message Template editor, variables like {nombre} or {monto} should look like code blocks (bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 font-mono px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs cursor-pointer hover:bg-zinc-700).
components.whatsapp_indicator: Top right corner. A glowing green dot (animate-pulse) with text 'WA Conectado'. If disconnected, glowing red.

icons.instruction: Use stroke-width 1.5 or 2. Keep icons minimal. Avoid overloading the UI with unnecessary icons.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: DO NOT use generic centered layouts or standard bloated SaaS designs. This must feel like an elite command center for high-volume operations.
Strictly follow the Dark Theme 'True Grey' approach. Base background is #09090B, cards are #18181B. DO NOT use pure white backgrounds anywhere.
For the Data Table, implement a dense layout (py-1.5 px-3). High volume users need to see 20+ rows at once without scrolling heavily.
Make the Execution Console/Logs visually distinct: like a true terminal interface. It should feel 'fun' and 'hacker-like' to watch messages go out.
Integrate the Country Selector deeply into the UI. Changing the country should instantly filter the table and change the accent colors of relevant widgets.
Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, inputs, tabs, and table rows to ensure automated testing reliability.
Do not apply `transition: all` globally. Target specific properties like `transition-colors` or `transition-transform` to prevent breaking complex layout animations.
Use Shadcn UI primitives but override their padding and background colors to match the ultra-dense True Grey dark theme.
